name: Cold-Pressed Castor Oil
shortDescription: Wood-pressed (kachi ghani) castor oil, extracted from sun-dried castor seeds.
description: Our castor oil is extracted using the traditional wood-press (kolhu) method at low temperature and speed, so it retains its natural ricinoleic acid content, colour and aroma. Unrefined, unfiltered beyond a single cloth-filter pass, and free of chemical solvents. Popular for hair and skin care, and as a natural massage oil.

name: Cold-Pressed Coconut Oil
shortDescription: Virgin, cold-pressed coconut oil from farm-fresh copra.
description: Pressed from hand-selected copra without heat or chemical refining, our coconut oil keeps its natural sweetness, aroma and nutrients intact. Suitable for cooking, skin and hair application. Turns solid below 24°C - a sign of purity, not a defect.

name: Cold-Pressed Sesame (Til) Oil
shortDescription: Wood-pressed sesame oil with roasted sesame seeds for deep flavour.
description: Extracted from black and white til seeds on a traditional wooden ghani, our sesame oil carries a rich, nutty aroma prized in South Indian and Ayurvedic kitchens. Also traditionally used for oil-pulling and body massage (abhyanga).

name: Cold-Pressed Groundnut Oil
shortDescription: Kachi ghani groundnut (peanut) oil, pressed from farm-fresh peanuts.
description: Made from sun-dried, hand-picked groundnuts, slow-pressed on a wooden ghani to preserve natural flavour and nutrition. A everyday cooking oil across Indian households, with a high smoke point ideal for frying and tempering.

name: Neem & Tulsi Handmade Soap
shortDescription: Cold-process soap with neem oil, tulsi extract and our own coconut oil base.
description: Handmade in small batches using the cold-process method, this soap blends neem oil and tulsi extract into a base of our own wood-pressed coconut oil. Naturally antibacterial and gentle enough for daily use on face and body. No parabens, sulphates, artificial fragrance or colour.

name: Turmeric & Sandalwood Soap
shortDescription: Brightening bath bar with wild turmeric, sandalwood and sesame oil.
description: A traditional ubtan-inspired bar made with wild turmeric (kasturi manjal), sandalwood powder and our cold-pressed sesame oil. Gently brightens and evens skin tone while keeping it moisturised. Handmade, cured for 4 weeks, and completely free of synthetic additives.

name: Moringa Leaf Powder
shortDescription: Shade-dried moringa (drumstick) leaves, stone-ground to a fine green powder.
description: Tender moringa leaves are plucked at dawn, shade-dried to protect nutrients, and stone-ground in small batches. A spoonful into smoothies, dal or chapati dough adds plant protein, iron and antioxidants. Single-origin, nothing added.

name: Amla Fruit Powder
shortDescription: Sun-dried wild amla, ground whole — for hair, skin and immunity.
description: Wild-harvested amla (Indian gooseberry) is de-seeded, sun-dried and ground whole with no additives. Rich in natural vitamin C — mix with warm water for immunity, into hair masks for stronger roots, or with honey as a daily tonic.
